name: Zhiyun Molus X60 RGB LED Monolight Combo
description: Just when you thought Zhiyun lights couldn't get smaller, the MOLUS X60RGB RGB LED Monolight Combo Kit falls into place.

features.Key Features:: Light with Grip Battery | Output: 2010 Lux at 3.3' (6500K) | 2700-6500K CCT; Full RGB Color Control | AC or Battery Power | Onboard & App Control | CRI 95 | TLCI 98 | Active Cooling, Ultracompact Design | ZY Mount, Optional Bowens Adapter | Includes Mini Reflector & Diffusion Dome | Includes Power Adapter & Bag
features.What’s in the box?: Zhiyun MOLUS X60RGB RGB LED Monolight (Combo Kit) | Mini Reflector | Diffusion Dome | Power Adapter with Cable | Power Adapter Pouch | PD Charging Cable | Grip Battery | Storage Bag | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
